parameters.query:
SELECT
  c.id,
  c.name,
  COALESCE(
    c.metadata->>'slug',
    lower(regexp_replace(c.name, '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g'))
  ) AS slug
FROM companies c
ORDER BY c.name;

SELECT
  c.id,
  c.name,
  COALESCE(
    c.metadata->>'slug',
    lower(regexp_replace(c.name, '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g'))
  ) AS slug,

  c.source,
  c.source_id,

  c.nickname,
  c.industry,
  NULLIF(c.wiki,'') AS wiki,

  COALESCE(c.is_item_manufacturer::int, 0)    AS is_item_manufacturer,
  COALESCE(c.is_vehicle_manufacturer::int, 0) AS is_vehicle_manufacturer,

  c.company_code,
  NULLIF(c.metadata->>'id','') AS uex_company_id

FROM companies c
WHERE c.id = '{{$json["id"]}}';
